hooks.command: input=$(cat); f=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty"); case "$f" in */.claude-plugin/*.json) jq -e . "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Invalid JSON in %s — fix the manifest before continuing."}' "$f";; esac

input=$(cat); f=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty"); case "$f" in *.sh) out=$(shellcheck -S error "$f" 2>&1) || jq -n --arg f "$f" --arg c "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("shellcheck flagged \($f):\n"+$c)}}';; esac
